targets.expr: sum by (job, serviceName, serviceType, operation, username) (rate(requests_failed_total{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username"}[5m]))/ sum by (job, serviceName, serviceType, operation, username) (rate(requests_total{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username"}[5m]))*100>0

panels.title: Avg Response Time by Service, User, Operation (s)

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (job, serviceType) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_bucket{le="0.5", job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m]))  / sum by (job,serviceType) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))*100>0

topk(50, sum by (job, serviceType) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_bucket{le="1.0", job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m]))  / sum by (job,serviceType) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))*100>0

topk(50, sum by (job, serviceType) (rate(requests_response_time_seconds_bucket{le="10.0", job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType"}[5m]))  / sum by (job,serviceType) (rate ( requests_response_time_seconds_count{job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))*100>0

panels.title: User Load: Service Requests Per Second

targets.expr: topk(10,sum by (job,appType, serviceName, username, operation) (rate(requests_total{job=~"$job",folderName=~"$folderName",serviceType=~"$serviceType",serviceName=~"$serviceName",operation=~"$operation",username=~"$username", operation=~"^.+$"}[5m])))>0

panels.title: Requests Per Second (req/s) by AppType, Service, User, Operation
Total Time Used  (sec/sec) by Service, User, Operation

targets.expr: ((sum by (job, nodeName, componentName) (disk_capacity_GB{job=~"$job",nodeName=~"$nodeName"})) - (sum by (job, nodeName, componentName) (disk_free_GB{job=~"$job",nodeName=~"$nodeName"}))) / (sum by (job, nodeName, componentName) (disk_capacity_GB{job=~"$job",nodeName=~"$nodeName"}))*100

((sum by (job, nodeName, componentName,diskMount, diskName) (disk_capacity_GB{job=~"$job",nodeName=~"$nodeName"})) - (sum by (job, nodeName, componentName, diskMount, diskName) (disk_free_GB{job=~"$job",nodeName=~"$nodeName"}))) / (sum by (job, nodeName, componentName,diskMount, diskName) (disk_capacity_GB{job=~"$job",nodeName=~"$nodeName"}))*100

ArcGIS Relational Data Store Table Row Count(count)
